'''yapungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fiasco|fiasco]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-p-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fiasco|fiasco]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yapungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || yæpingith || yæpingij || yæpingish || yæpingi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || yapupunguth || yapupunguj || yapupungush || yapupungu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || yapunguth || yapunguj || yapungush || yapungu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || yapufngufth || yapufngufj || yapufngufsh || yapufnguf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || yapunguthu || yapunguju || yapungushu || yapunguku
|-
| [[Patient]] || yapunguth || yapunguj || yapungush || yapungu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || yapunguthul || yapungujul || yapungushul || yapungukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || yapunguuthuthu || yapunguujuju || yapunguushushu || yapunguuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || yapunguthun || yapungujun || yapungushun || yapungukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || yapunguthuoro || yapungujuoro || yapungushuoro || yapungukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
